title: Network Security, Attacks, Segmentation, and Hardening · Incident Case: Net Acl Filtering
summary: Threat-model and harden enterprise, guest, IoT, OT, management, and remote-access network zones. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net acl filtering increment in a defense-in-depth network security plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Design ordered ACL, URL, and content filtering rules with least privilege, state, direction, logging, and exception review.
Disable unused ports and services, change defaults, use port security, 802.1X, MAC filtering limits, and key management.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
